# Stay Starving Holdings LLC

> Stay Starving is a systems-driven luxury holding company founded by Charles "Trey" Cooper III, building $100M+ in diversified holdings across AI consulting, media production, digital products, real estate investment, and specialty contracting. The core philosophy: wealth is engineered through systems and alignment — not hustle, not luck.

## Divisions

### LuxCor AI
- Enterprise AI consulting and automation agency
- Specializes in workflow automation, custom AI agent development, and generative AI strategy
- Uses the proprietary WAT framework (Workflows, Agents, Tools) for production-grade AI system architecture
- WAT separates probabilistic AI reasoning from deterministic code execution for maximum reliability
- Services: AI workflow automation, custom AI agents, voice agent deployment, business process optimization

### Stay Starving Media
- Full-service media production and content distribution engine
- YouTube long-form, Shorts, LinkedIn, email newsletter
- AI-powered video editing pipeline
- Builds audiences that convert across every monetization layer

### C6 Properties LLC
- Real estate investment and short-term rental operations
- Dynamic pricing optimization, automated guest communication, smart home IoT
- Property acquisition, analysis, and portfolio management

### The Boardroom
- Premium membership community for operators building wealth
- Three course tracks: AI Systems, Real Estate, Stock Market & Options
- Gamification: Associate to C-Suite progression through engagement and results
- Monthly AMAs and strategy sessions

### KayphoriaX
- High fashion lingerie couture brand (KXSS collaboration with Stay Starving)
- Body positivity, creative self-expression, diversity-focused fashion
- Collections: HEART ABLAZE, GOOD VS. EVIL, DREAMLAND, GARDEN

### Opulent Sky Solutions
- Professional drone services for real estate, commercial, and events
- Aerial photography, 4K video flyovers, property surveys
- Licensed and insured drone operations

### Stay Starving Ventures
- Strategic investment arm
- Deploys capital into creators, automation startups, and ecosystem-aligned opportunities

### Stay Starving Foundation
- Nonprofit arm for youth mentorship, financial literacy, and automation education
- Community outreach and scholarship programs

### Trey Cooper Realty
- Licensed Florida Realtor specializing in multifamily and commercial real estate
- AI-powered lead qualification and market analysis

## Key Concepts

### WAT Framework
The WAT (Workflows, Agents, Tools) framework is an AI systems architecture developed by LuxCor AI:
- **Workflows**: Markdown SOPs defining objectives, required inputs, which tools to use, expected outputs, and edge case handling
- **Agents**: AI decision-makers that read workflows, call tools in sequence, handle failures, and improve over time
- **Tools**: Deterministic Python scripts for API calls, data transformations, file operations, and database queries
- Key insight: A five-step AI workflow at 90% accuracy per step yields only 59% end-to-end accuracy. By making execution deterministic, WAT achieves near 100% per-step tool accuracy while AI focuses on orchestration.

### Escape Velocity
Stay Starving's financial independence metric — the point where business income exceeds employment income, enabling the founder to operate full-time on the holding company.

## Founder
- **Charles "Trey" Cooper III** — Founder & CEO
- Started investing in stocks and crypto at 18
- Licensed Florida Realtor at 22
- First investment property at 25
- Built the WAT Framework for AI automation
- Target: $100M+ diversified holdings by 2030
